_comment: ComfyUI API-format upscale graph (FIX-plugin-comfy-workflows §2). An upscale model (e.g. 4x-UltraSharp / RealESRGAN) enlarges a source image. Requires an upscale model on the box — the service probes hasNode('UpscaleModelLoader') first. <<upscale_model>> is a filename from /object_info/UpscaleModelLoader; <<source_image>> from /upload/image.
